changelog: Expanded Platform Support: You can now easily add and manage games from Steam, Epic Games, and GOG.
Unified App Management: Simplified interface with all apps under the Installed tab.
Smart Monitoring: Countdown auto-cancels if you close apps manually.
New Visual Identity: Fresh logo and application icon.
UI Scaling Overhaul: Fixed interface appearing cut off on certain screen resolutions.
Fixed: Temporarily disabled apps now correctly display as grayed out.
Performance: Various improvements for a smoother experience.
Stability: General code cleanup and bug fixes.
